modules.firstHelloCheckIn.riskControls.3.value: Do not reveal precise live location or individual answers to hosts.
modules.firstHelloCheckIn.riskControls.3.description: Event Success modules copy for firstHelloCheckIn.riskControls.

modules.microPods.riskControls.1.value: Offer an opt-out for attendees who arrive with friends.
modules.microPods.riskControls.1.description: Event Success modules copy for microPods.riskControls.

modules.liveReveal.setupSteps.2.value: Use the saved countdown to create a synchronized room moment.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.title.description: Event Success modules copy for compatibilityQuestionnaire.title.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.atten.value: Matching moments have a reason beyond looks.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.hostP.value: Creates reveal clues and optional pairing context without promising chemistry.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.setup.value: Ask fewer than ten questions in the first version.
modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.setup.description: Event Success modules copy for compatibilityQuestionnaire.setupSteps.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.setup.value: Tie questions to the event vibe, not a permanent personality score.
modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.setup.description: Event Success modules copy for compatibilityQuestionnaire.setupSteps.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.setup.value: Explain compatibility as conversation context, not destiny.
modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.setup.description: Event Success modules copy for compatibilityQuestionnaire.setupSteps.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.riskC.value: Avoid implying Catch can predict chemistry.
modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.riskC.description: Event Success modules copy for compatibilityQuestionnaire.riskControls.

modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.riskC.value: Do not block organic interaction before the reveal.
modules.compatibilityQuestionnaire.riskC.description: Event Success modules copy for compatibilityQuestionnaire.riskControls.

modules.wingmanRequests.setupSteps.2.value: Limit candidates to compatible checked-in attendees.
modules.wingmanRequests.setupSteps.2.description: Event Success modules copy for wingmanRequests.setupSteps.

modules.wingmanRequests.setupSteps.3.value: Use requests while the room is still active.
modules.wingmanRequests.setupSteps.3.description: Event Success modules copy for wingmanRequests.setupSteps.

modules.wingmanRequests.riskControls.1.value: Show hosts only requests where the attendee explicitly opted in.

modules.wingmanRequests.riskControls.2.value: Do not notify the requested attendee automatically.
modules.wingmanRequests.riskControls.2.description: Event Success modules copy for wingmanRequests.riskControls.

modules.wingmanRequests.riskControls.3.value: Respect blocks, reports, and profile visibility settings.
modules.wingmanRequests.riskControls.3.description: Event Success modules copy for wingmanRequests.riskControls.

modules.contextualOpeners.hostPromise.1.description: Event Success modules copy for contextualOpeners.hostPromise.

modules.hostAnalytics.attendeePromise.1.value: The next event should feel better because this one taught us something.
modules.hostAnalytics.attendeePromise.1.description: Event Success modules copy for hostAnalytics.attendeePromise.

modules.hostAnalytics.hostPromise.1.value: Turns check-in, mixing, crushes, reviews, and repeats into advice.
modules.hostAnalytics.hostPromise.1.description: Event Success modules copy for hostAnalytics.hostPromise.

modules.hostAnalytics.setupSteps.1.description: Event Success modules copy for hostAnalytics.setupSteps.

modules.hostAnalytics.setupSteps.2.value: Recommend one or two changes, not a dashboard wall.

modules.hostAnalytics.setupSteps.3.value: Track improvement over repeated events by the same host.

coach.analyze.title.1.value: Review comfort and safety before the next event
coach.analyze.title.1.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.1.value: Safety incidents should block optimization work until the host has a clear escalation and prevention plan.
coach.analyze.rationale.1.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.title.2.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.2.value: Low check-in makes assignments, reviews, and host coaching less trustworthy.
coach.analyze.rationale.2.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.strength.1.value: Arrival data is reliable enough for matching and reports.
coach.analyze.strength.1.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.title.3.value: Decide pending requests before demand goes cold
coach.analyze.title.3.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.3.value: Request-to-join works only if people hear back while the event still feels timely.
coach.analyze.rationale.3.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.title.4.value: Make waitlist offers easier to accept
coach.analyze.title.4.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.4.value: Offers are being sent, but not enough people are converting. Shorter expiry windows and clearer arrival expectations usually help.
coach.analyze.rationale.4.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.strength.2.value: A meaningful share of attendees came back.
coach.analyze.strength.2.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.title.5.value: Create more social permission during the event
coach.analyze.title.5.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.5.value: Movement-heavy events need light pods and cooldown prompts instead of phone-heavy live tasks.
coach.analyze.rationale.5.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.rationale.6.value: Stationary events can use teams, rotations, or prompts to reduce approach anxiety.
coach.analyze.rationale.6.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.strength.3.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.strength.4.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.title.6.value: Refresh assignments from the live roster
coach.analyze.title.6.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.7.value: Low assignment coverage means attendees may be missing the structured moments that make the event feel intentional.
coach.analyze.rationale.7.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.title.7.value: Make structured participation feel easier to opt into
coach.analyze.title.7.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.8.value: A high opt-out rate usually means pods or rotations need clearer framing, shorter rounds, or softer host facilitation.
coach.analyze.rationale.8.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.strength.5.value: Some attendees trusted the host enough to ask for help live.
coach.analyze.strength.5.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.title.8.value: Use wingman requests before the final reveal
coach.analyze.title.8.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.9.value: Host-visible help requests are strongest while the room is still live, before attendees lose momentum.
coach.analyze.rationale.9.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.title.9.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.10.value: Matches are forming, but chat is not starting reliably. Shared event context should make the first message easier.
coach.analyze.rationale.10.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.strength.6.value: Mutual matches are converting into chat starts.
coach.analyze.strength.6.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.title.10.value: Make the host opening clearer and warmer
coach.analyze.title.10.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.11.value: A weak welcome can make attendees feel like strangers sharing space instead of participants in the same event.
coach.analyze.rationale.11.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.title.11.value: Adjust the amount of live structure
coach.analyze.title.11.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.12.value: Structure should create permission to connect without making the event feel controlled or artificial.
coach.analyze.rationale.12.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

coach.analyze.strength.7.value: Feedback response is strong enough to trust the report.
coach.analyze.strength.7.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.strength.

coach.analyze.title.12.value: Ask for feedback while the event is still fresh
coach.analyze.title.12.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.title.

coach.analyze.rationale.13.value: A thin feedback sample makes the coach less reliable. Prompting checked-in attendees sooner gives the host a clearer read.
coach.analyze.rationale.13.description: Event Success coach copy for analyze.rationale.

eventPolicyCancellation.quoteFor.explana.value: Waitlisted attendees have not paid and can leave freely.
Host or platform cancellation overrides host policy; the attendee gets a full refund before any host payout.
No payment was collected for this event.
The attendee cancelled before the full-refund cutoff for this policy.
The cash refund window has closed, but this policy still returns platform credit.
The attendee cancelled after the final cancellation window for this policy.
